common.loginPrompt: After logging in, you can follow other users or hashtags, like, share, and reply to posts, or interact with accounts on different servers.

hero.title: A Better Way to {br} Experience
hero.subtitle: A modern, fast, and beautiful Mastodon client. Connect to the decentralized social network and take control of your digital life.

profile.name: Post Growth Institute
profile.bio: Exploring a just and livable <tag>#postgrowth</tag> world beyond capitalism 🌍 Post Growth Fellowship, Offers and Needs Markets, Jobs Board & more

bento.subtitle: Every detail crafted for a better social experience.

connect.title: One Account,{br}Infinite Connections
connect.desc: Follow users on any server. Together we build a better internet.

timeline.title: Your Timeline,{br}Your Rules
timeline.desc: No algorithm, pure chronology. See exactly what you want to see.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Your data belongs to you. We protect your privacy, not sell it.

opensource.title: Open Source,{br}Community Driven
opensource.desc: Built by developers worldwide. Transparent, auditable, and trustworthy.

everywhere.title: Works Everywhere
everywhere.desc: Seamlessly use it on web, desktop, or mobile. Consistent experience across all platforms.

decentralized.title: Decentralized
decentralized.desc: Connect across servers. Your data belongs to you. No one controls the whole network.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.desc: Fully transparent code, community-audited, no hidden logic.

chronological.title: Chronological Feed
chronological.desc: See real content in chronological order, free from recommendation algorithms.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection
privacy.desc: No ads, no tracking, no manipulation. That is our promise.

cta.title: Ready to Join the Fediverse?
cta.subtitle: Sign up for any Mastodon instance to connect to the entire decentralized social network.

footer.builtWith: Built with <heart></heart> for the open web

timeline.empty: Your timeline is empty. Follow some users or hashtags to see posts here.
timeline.discover: Discover what's happening across the fediverse
